findings.summary: USB hub (23 components). Incorrect regulator topology: U3 (CY7C65642 USB hub IC) VREG pin classified as LDO output but it is actually a reference input pin.

incorrect.description: U3 CY7C65642 USB hub IC VREG pin classified as LDO regulator output, but VREG is actually a voltage reference input pin

suggestions: Do not classify IC pins named VREG as regulator outputs without verifying the IC is actually a regulator
